description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image with a global before_script that runs `apt-get update -qq` and `apt-get install -qq build-essential curl git`, and set CARGO_HOME to `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo`. Define a `linux` job (default stage) that runs its own before_script `apt-get update && apt-get -y install cmake`, then executes `rustup default nightly` followed by `cargo build`, and shares a cache of the `cargo/` and `target/` directories. Define a `redox` job (default stage) with a before_script that runs `apt-get update -qq`, installs `build-essential curl git gnupg software-properties-common apt-transport-https`, adds the Redox toolchain repository via `apt-key adv --keyserver keyserver.ubuntu.com --recv-keys AA12E97F0881517F` and `add-apt-repository 'deb https://static.redox-os.org/toolchain/apt /'`, installs `x86-64-unknown-redox-gcc`, sets the Rust toolchain to `nightly-2018-07-18` with `rustup default nightly-2018-07-18`, adds the target `x86_64-unknown-redox` via `rustup target add x86_64-unknown-redox`, and defines the variable CC as `x86_64-unknown-redox-gcc`. The `redox` job then runs `cargo build --target x86_64-unknown-redox` and also uses the same `cargo/` and `target/` cache. No artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
